Simple HTML Test Document

This is a basic HTML document for testing the HTML2PDF converter. It contains various HTML elements to verify proper rendering.

Typography

This paragraph demonstrates bold text, italic text, and inline code. The document uses a serif font for body text to improve readability.

Here is a paragraph with a link to test link styling and handling.

Note: This highlighted box tests div elements with CSS class styling.

Conclusion

This document provides a basic test case for HTML to PDF conversion, covering common HTML elements and CSS styling.
